# ReUI

> ReUI is a first-class shadcn registry offering a collection of enterprise-grade components 
built for shadcn and compatible with Base UI, Radix UI, and Tailwind CSS v4. Designed for developers and AI-driven workflows.

## Overview

- [Introduction](https://reui.io/docs): Core principles - Components and Blocks for flexible abstraction.
- [Get Started](https://reui.io/docs/get-started): Quick guide to adding ReUI components to your application.
- [Styling](https://reui.io/docs/styling): Design token system using CSS variables for precise state management.
- [Registry](https://reui.io/docs/registry): Information about the ReUI registry and distribution.
- [Agent Skills](https://reui.io/docs/agent-skills): What the free ReUI Agent Skill is and how it pairs with the MCP - the skill teaches the agent the find -> install -> read-API -> adapt workflow; installed locally by one command or delivered through the MCP for hosted services.
- [AI Tools](https://reui.io/docs/claude): Connect any MCP-capable coding agent or service to https://mcp.reui.io. Sign in with ReUI (free account, OAuth) to use it; free covers components and examples, a Pro or Ultimate license unlocks premium blocks and icons. Each guide also installs the ReUI agent skill. Per-agent guides: [Claude](https://reui.io/docs/claude), [Codex](https://reui.io/docs/codex), [Cursor](https://reui.io/docs/cursor), [OpenCode](https://reui.io/docs/opencode), [Lovable](https://reui.io/docs/lovable), [Replit](https://reui.io/docs/replit).
- [Roadmap](https://reui.io/docs/roadmap): Future plans and upcoming features.
- [Changelog](https://reui.io/docs/changelog): Latest updates and version history.

## Base UI Components
Components built with [Base UI](https://base-ui.com) primitives.
All entries below except File Upload are among the 17 installable ReUI components; File Upload is an additional documented pattern.

- [Alert](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/alert): Callout for user attention (success, info, warning, error).
- [Autocomplete](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/autocomplete): Searchable select with autocomplete.
- [Badge](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/badge): Status indicators and labels.
- [Data Grid](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/data-grid): Advanced data table with sorting and filtering.
- [Date Selector](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/date-selector): Multi-mode date and range selection.
- [File Upload](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/file-upload): Drag and drop file uploading.
- [Filters](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/filters): Multi-facet filtering interface.
- [Frame](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/frame): Container with title and actions.
- [Icon Stack](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/icon-stack): Isometric icons, layered icon illustrations, and empty-state visuals.
- [Kanban](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/kanban): Drag and drop board for task management.
- [Number Field](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/number-field): Specialized input for numeric data.
- [Phone Input](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/phone-input): International phone number input.
- [Rating](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/rating): Interactive star rating component.
- [Scrollspy](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/scrollspy): Navigation that tracks scroll position.
- [Sortable](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/sortable): Drag and drop list sorting.
- [Stepper](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/stepper): Multi-step process indicator.
- [Timeline](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/timeline): Chronological list of events.
- [Tree](https://reui.io/docs/components/base/tree): Hierarchical data structure view.

## Radix UI Components
Components built with [Radix UI](https://www.radix-ui.com) primitives.
All entries below except File Upload are among the 17 installable ReUI components; File Upload is an additional documented pattern.

- [Alert](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/alert): Callout for user attention.
- [Autocomplete](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/autocomplete): Searchable select with autocomplete.
- [Badge](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/badge): Status indicators and labels.
- [Data Grid](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/data-grid): Advanced data table with sorting and filtering.
- [Date Selector](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/date-selector): Multi-mode date and range selection.
- [File Upload](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/file-upload): Drag and drop file uploading.
- [Filters](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/filters): Multi-facet filtering interface.
- [Frame](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/frame): Container with title and actions.
- [Icon Stack](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/icon-stack): Isometric icons, layered icon illustrations, and empty-state visuals.
- [Kanban](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/kanban): Drag and drop board for task management.
- [Number Field](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/number-field): Specialized input for numeric data.
- [Phone Input](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/phone-input): International phone number input.
- [Rating](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/rating): Interactive star rating component.
- [Scrollspy](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/scrollspy): Navigation that tracks scroll position.
- [Sortable](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/sortable): Drag and drop list sorting.
- [Stepper](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/stepper): Multi-step process indicator.
- [Timeline](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/timeline): Chronological list of events.
- [Tree](https://reui.io/docs/components/radix/tree): Hierarchical data structure view.
